block_00: New deposit methods for Thailand available
block_11: We are excited to announce new payment methods for traders in Thailand! Please note that there are two methods for completing deposits via local banks: ATM and QR code. For more information on how to deposit with these different methods, see the steps below.
block_13: 1. Log in to your IQ Option account and go to the Deposit section.
block_14: 2. Choose the deposit amount and select your preferred payment method.
block_15: If you select an ATM payment method, fill in the necessary info for the invoice. To complete the deposit, pay the invoice at your selected bank or use the QR code to pay online.
block_16: If you select a QR payment method, the QR code will redirect you to complete the payment using an online application.
block_18: We wish you a fantastic trading experience!
